topics.title: Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 Reveals Joker Voice Actor: House of the Dragon Star Matthew Needham
topics.primaryEntity: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
topics.angle: Matthew Needham will voice the Joker in the second season of 'Batman: Caped Crusader'.

sources.headline: Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 Reveals Joker Voice Actor: House of the Dragon Star Matthew Needham
sources.summary: Batman: Caped Crusader has unmasked its Joker. House of the Dragon star Matthew Needham will voice the villain in Season 2 of the animated noir series after the Clown Prince of Crime was teased at the end of Season 1. (John DiMaggio, who voices Detective Harvey Bullock on the show, is credited with voicing the [ ]

sources.headline: Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 Adds Matthew Needham To Voice The Joker
sources.summary: Matthew Needham is voicing The Joker in the upcoming second season of Prime Video s Batman: Caped Crusader. The news was revealed at San Diego Comic-Con on Thursday that the House of the Dragon actor would be adding his name to the list of prolific actors who have lent their talents to the Clown Prince of Crime. [ ]

sources.headline: Destin Daniel Cretton Believes Secrecy Around Sadie Sink’s Role Makes ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ a Better Movie
sources.summary: Five few years ago, Tobey Maguire and Andrew Garfield were kept out of the marketing for 'No Way Home.' Marvel and Sony are somewhat repeating that playbook for the 'Stranger Things' star's mystery part.

topics.title: The Beach Boys Postpone Summer Concerts, Will Resume in Fall
topics.angle: The touring version of The Beach Boys postpones remaining summer concerts.

sources.headline: Beach Boys Call Off Remainder of Summer Concerts to Recharge Before Resuming in Fall
sources.summary: The Beach Boys endless summer has run into a hitch. The touring version of the group, led by sole remaining original member Mike Love, has called off six weeks worth of concerts scheduled for this summer, amounting to nearly 30 dates, citing the need to recharge before hitting the road again in the fall. sources.headline: Marvelous Mrs. Maisel Set Designer Mary Kate Golding Fatally Stabbed In Apparent Murder-Suicide
sources.summary: Mary Kate Golding, a 34-year-old New York City set decorator whose credits include The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, Goosebumps and the 2025 Netflix docuseries Gone Girls: The Long Island Serial Killer, died Tuesday at her Queens residence in what police say was a possible murder-suicide.
